name: Transformer-Guided Swarm Intelligence for Frugal Neural Architecture Search

description: arXiv:2607.11826v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has automated the design of deep learning models but traditionally requires massive computational resources, often measured in thousands of GPU-days. In this paper, we propose a frugal and memetic NAS framework designed to democratize architecture design on consumer-grade hardware. Our approach combines the globa...
author: Romain Amigon
